requirement_topic.en: CEB Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz and Project Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: CEB并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz及项目协调
requirement_topic.zht: CEB併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz及項目協調

summary.en: Mauritius electricity supply is commonly 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, with grid connection and distribution coordination handled by the Central Electricity Board (CEB). EV charging projects must confirm service capacity, metering, protection settings, load management, harmonic impact, civil and electrical installation readiness, and commissioning documentation with CEB or the relevant project utility interface. URA regulates the utility sector, while MSB standards and IEC-aligned project specifications may be used for product and installation evidence. Coastal sites require cyclone, humidity, corrosion, and salt-mist derating in addition to normal grid compatibility checks.
summary.zh: 毛里求斯供电通常为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，并网和配电协调由中央电力局（CEB）负责。电动汽车充电项目须与CEB或相关项目公用事业接口确认供电容量、计量、保护整定、负载管理、谐波影响、土建及电气安装准备情况和调试文件。URA监管公用事业部门，MSB标准及IEC对齐项目规格可用于产品和安装证据。沿海站点除常规电网兼容性检查外，还需考虑台风、湿度、腐蚀和盐雾降额。
summary.zht: 模里西斯供電通常為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，併網和配電協調由中央電力局（CEB）負責。電動汽車充電項目須與CEB或相關項目公用事業接口確認供電容量、計量、保護整定、負載管理、諧波影響、土建及電氣安裝準備情況和調試文件。URA監管公用事業部門，MSB標準及IEC對齊項目規格可用於產品和安裝證據。沿海站點除常規電網兼容性檢查外，還需考慮颱風、濕度、腐蝕和鹽霧降額。

standards_or_laws: Central Electricity Board (CEB) grid-connection and distribution coordination requirements
Utility Regulatory Authority (URA) electricity-sector regulatory framework
Mauritius Standards Bureau (MSB) standards and conformity functions
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are normally designed around 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz networks, GB/T 18487.1-2023 charging-system requirements, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 DC charging communication, and local Chinese grid-operator project acceptance. The frequency is the same as Mauritius, but rated voltage, utility acceptance documents, protection settings, and coastal derating assumptions differ.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常围绕220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz电网、GB/T 18487.1-2023充电系统要求、GB/T 20234接口标准、GB/T 27930-2023直流充电通信，以及中国本地电网运营商项目验收进行设计。频率与毛里求斯相同，但额定电压、公用事业验收文件、保护整定和沿海降额假设不同。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常圍繞220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz電網、GB/T 18487.1-2023充電系統要求、GB/T 20234接口標準、GB/T 27930-2023直流充電通訊，以及中國本地電網運營商項目驗收進行設計。頻率與模里西斯相同，但額定電壓、公用事業驗收文件、保護整定和沿海降額假設不同。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that charger input ratings cover 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, prepare CEB-facing single-line diagrams and load calculations, document harmonic and EMC behaviour, and provide thermal and corrosion derating for Mauritius coastal and cyclone exposure. A China-only 220/380 V design package without Mauritius utility coordination is not grid-ready.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认充电桩输入额定值覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，准备面向CEB的单线图和负荷计算，记录谐波及EMC表现，并提供适配毛里求斯沿海和台风暴露的热与腐蚀降额。仅面向中国220/380 V设计且未进行毛里求斯公用事业协调的资料包不具备并网就绪状态。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認充電樁輸入額定值覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，準備面向CEB的單線圖和負荷計算，記錄諧波及EMC表現，並提供適配模里西斯沿海和颱風暴露的熱與腐蝕降額。僅面向中國220/380 V設計且未進行模里西斯公用事業協調的資料包不具備併網就緒狀態。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected charger projects require CEB coordination and project-specific utility acceptance; URA oversight may apply where regulated electricity services are affected
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid acceptance applies domestically and is not a CEB or URA approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mauritius grid readiness requires CEB coordination, 230/400 V 50 Hz rating confirmation, power-quality evidence, and coastal derating. China domestic grid-acceptance documents do not replace Mauritius utility acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 毛里求斯并网就绪需要CEB协调、230/400 V 50 Hz额定值确认、电能质量证据及沿海降额。中国国内电网验收文件不能替代毛里求斯公用事业验收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 模里西斯併網就緒需要CEB協調、230/400 V 50 Hz額定值確認、電能質量證據及沿海降額。中國國內電網驗收文件不能替代模里西斯公用事業驗收。
